title: orostachys polycephala
intro: Orostachys polycephala, also known as the Chinese crown or crown asparagus, is a type of succulent plant that belongs to the Asparagaceae family. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating cough and sore throat, and improving digestion. In herbal preparations, Orostachys polycephala is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions, and is also used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
